name: pigtex
description: Desktop AI workstation with an Electron/React frontend and FastAPI backend.
author: ctex-ai

scripts.build:preview: npm run build:renderer && npm run build:electron && node ./scripts/run-electron-builder.cjs --config ./electron-builder.preview.json
scripts.build:win:preview: npm run build:renderer && npm run build:electron && node ./scripts/run-electron-builder.cjs --config ./electron-builder.preview.json --win
scripts.build:win:preview:dir: npm run build:renderer && npm run build:electron && node ./scripts/run-electron-builder.cjs --config ./electron-builder.preview.json --win --dir
scripts.build:win:release: npm run build:renderer && npm run build:electron && node ./scripts/run-electron-builder.cjs --config ./electron-builder.release.json --win
scripts.build:win:release:publish: npm run build:win:release && npm run release:stage && npm run release:publish
scripts.build:ga: node ./scripts/validate-public-ga-signing.cjs && npm run build:renderer && npm run build:electron && node ./scripts/run-electron-builder.cjs --config ./electron-builder.ga.json
scripts.build:win:ga: node ./scripts/validate-public-ga-signing.cjs && npm run build:renderer && npm run build:electron && node ./scripts/run-electron-builder.cjs --config ./electron-builder.ga.json --win
